title: Fix image upload functionality

requirements.text: Debug and fix the image upload component (ImageUpload.tsx) to ensure images are successfully uploaded and stored in the backend
acceptanceCriteria: Image files can be selected through the file input
Selected images display correctly in the preview
Upload progress indicator shows accurate progress
Images are successfully converted to ExternalBlob format
Backend receives and stores the image blob data correctly
Uploaded images can be retrieved and displayed in ProductCard and ProductDetail components

requirements.text: Verify the backend blob storage mechanism in main.mo correctly handles image data for snack items
acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts blob data from frontend upload requests
Images are stored in the Map-based state correctly
Stored images can be retrieved via getSnackItem queries
Image data integrity is maintained through storage and retrieval

requirements.text: Ensure the Admin page snack creation form properly integrates with the ImageUpload component and handles upload errors gracefully
acceptanceCriteria: Form submission waits for image upload completion
Upload errors display clear error messages to admin users
Successful uploads enable the form submit button
Failed uploads prevent form submission and show retry options

constraints: Do not modify the existing PIN authentication system (PIN: 8914)
Maintain the current Map-based backend state structure
Preserve the ExternalBlob upload pattern used in ImageUpload.tsx
nonGoals: Changing the image storage backend architecture
Adding new image formats beyond current support
